overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, digital billboards, and wet reflective surfaces. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's detailed urban environment with various pedestrians and futuristic architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking across the reflective crosswalk toward the building entrance with digital billboards

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'CHOOH2' advertisement on building facade
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and glass exterior
broad yellow stripes marking the pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: Starting at a wet urban intersection at night, the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a large building adorned with digital billboards. The streets are reflective from recent rain, and sparse pedestrian traffic is visible crossing in different directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with commercial club and retail

events.description: turns right from crosswalk onto sidewalk alongside metal railing
passes the prominent red neon 'BIG SHOT' club sign on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians and the illuminated BIG SHOT establishment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the railing

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'BIG SHOT' on building facade
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from street level
tall palm trees lining the street ahead against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Turning onto the sidewalk, the camera passes the prominent red 'BIG SHOT' neon sign and walks alongside a metal railing. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and palm trees line the street ahead against the backdrop of towering futuristic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with digital advertising and neon facades

events.description: purple neon lights become prominent on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past street bollards and illuminated advertisements

tall structure with multiple stacked digital advertisements
black and yellow striped posts lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial street, the camera passes black and yellow street bollards while approaching a building with prominent purple neon lighting. Large digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street as the environment transitions toward a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with large digital displays

events.description: enters covered walkway with overhead structure and purple ambient lighting
passes large vertical digital billboard with animated character content

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered pedestrian area, passing by an escalator and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright blue pants standing near the large digital screen

entered.detail: overhead covered structure with geometric supports providing shelter
massive vertical digital display showing animated advertisements
mechanical escalator with glass sides leading to upper level
green and red digital sign with anime-style character and 'Fuyutsuki' text
red neon sign reading 'Voodoo' above a storefront near a dumpster

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway bathed in purple and pink neon light, the camera moves past massive digital billboards and an escalator structure. The environment features reflective wet surfaces and dense commercial signage, including a 'Fuyutsuki' advertisement and a 'Voodoo' neon sign near a dumpster at the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked urban intersection into the dense, neon-saturated depths of a futuristic commercial district. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a building adorned with digital billboards, where the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding city lights. As the camera turns onto the sidewalk, it passes a prominent red BIG SHOT neon sign and moves alongside a metal railing and palm trees that line the path toward towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts along a commercial street past black and yellow bollards, with the lighting transitioning from general city glow to intense purple hues as the camera approaches a covered walkway. Finally, the movement leads into this sheltered corridor bathed in pink and purple neon, gliding past massive digital advertisements and an escalator before ending near a Voodoo sign and a dumpster.
